major_differences.parameter: Time Not Comfortable Based on Simple ASHRAE 55-2004
major_differences.interpretation: The modified simulation maintained the same level of discomfort hours as the baseline, indicating that thermal comfort was preserved despite changes made to reduce cooling load.

major_differences.parameter: Time Setpoint Not Met During Occupied Heating
major_differences.interpretation: The heating setpoint met criteria remained unchanged, suggesting that the modifications did not negatively impact heating performance.

summary.overall_trend: The modifications aimed at reducing cooling load were successful without compromising thermal comfort, as evidenced by unchanged discomfort hours and heating setpoint compliance.
